description: P2P marketplace for home EV chargers — Airbnb model. India, Delhi NCR. Next.js + TypeScript + Supabase + Razorpay.

conventions.moneyHandling: Always integers in paise (rupees × 100). Never floats. Use rupeesToPaise/paiseToRupees/formatINR helpers.
conventions.componentStyle: Function components only. Named exports. Server components by default; client components only when needed.

forbidden: trusting frontend for payment confirmation (always verify webhook server-side)
React Native or Flutter (use Next.js + Capacitor)
Firebase as database (wrong shape for marketplace)
